mano_cua.result_summary: PlayCanvas Editor 构建后 dist 目录无 index.html，serve 只提供静态文件目录列表。编辑器需要后端 API 支持才能运行（/api 路径返回 404），无法在纯浏览器中独立测试层级面板功能。mano-cua 花 55 步尝试访问编辑器但始终看到目录列表或 404。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: dist/ directory has no index.html. The serve command only provides static file listing. Editor requires backend API support to function. Cannot test Hierarchy panel auto-scroll feature in standalone browser environment.
